raw_output:
PR #131 review (Claude, Fable 5). Correctness: repo+tag verified live (v0.2.0 -> 33affa2, = main tip; SKILL.md version matches); install command works verbatim; local install already at exactly v0.2.0; escalation paraphrase faithful one-to-one; preflight bindings match live ruleset 18500043 (review-gate among 6 required checks on dev+main, squash/merge methods match, strict up-to-date on); retired direct-to-dev exception claim true (pull_request rule enforced). P3 (minor): paraphrase lossy in two spots — drops the skill's 'not bug fixes' carve-out (errs stricter) and compresses the data item to 'non-additive data changes'. Internal consistency: none found; CI Health/PR/Git Workflow sections all compatible; no aspirational claims.
Security: no enforcement weakened; docs-only; documented merge policy is a strict subset of what the ruleset permits. LOW: '(admin bypass exists for the human only)' states policy as enforcement fact — the bypass actor is the admin role class and the agent's token IS admin; what keeps it human-only is the never-use---admin rule. Suggest rewording.

--- Post-review delta ---
Fix round applied after review: SHA-pin + verify-existing-install line, faithful escalation paraphrase (bug-fix carve-out + full data item), bypass wording (policy vs enforcement). Attested hash covers the fixed text; delta verified same-section.

findings.summary: 'Admin bypass for the human only' states policy as an enforcement fact (agent token is admin-class)
findings.reason: Reworded: bypass is a role-class fact; policy (never --admin, never direct push) is what makes it human-only. Converged with Codex Low.
